meaning: n.胡说,婴儿发出的咿哑声adj.胡说的
examples: I realized I was babbling like an idiot.
They were all babbling away in a foreign language.
Babbling is how a human baby learns to speak.
Visitors start their hike in lush, grassy valleys, trekking past thick bamboo trunks and babbling brooks.
Your 20s are not the time to be babbling about a hot new restaurant with the amaaaaazing chef.
